title: Show HN: I mapped 954K addresses because AI hallucinated my trash day
description: A developer created a comprehensive trash pickup schedule mapping system after AI assistants provided incorrect information about their trash collection day. This highlights current limitations of AI in accessing accurate local information.
author: hudtaylor

title: Labor Market Impacts of AI
description: Anthropic research on how AI is impacting labor markets and job roles. Important analysis of AI's real-world effects on employment.
author: jjwiseman

title: Tech firms pledge to pay for AI data centre power costs
description: Discussion about major technology companies committing to cover power costs for AI data centers, addressing energy consumption concerns of AI infrastructure.
author: inaros

title: Netflix is buying Ben Affleck's AI startup
description: Netflix acquires Interpositive, Ben Affleck's AI startup, signaling continued tech industry investment in AI technologies for media applications.
author: ripe

title: AI Is Not Going to Kill Software Engineering
description: Article arguing that AI will not replace software engineers but will transform the profession. Discusses the evolving role of developers in an AI-augmented landscape.
author: nr378

title: Android released a new official LLM code-generation benchmark: Android Bench
description: Google releases Android Bench, a new official benchmark for evaluating LLM code generation specifically for Android development, providing standardized metrics for AI coding assistants.
author: zmlatorre

title: Code Bonito – Design prompts for vibecoding tools
description: A tool for designing and optimizing prompts for AI coding assistants, focusing on improving AI-generated code quality through better prompt engineering.
author: utshull

title: Show HN: A Claude Code skill that renders decisions as interactive HTML pages
description: A new tool for Claude Code that visualizes AI decision-making processes as interactive HTML pages, improving transparency and understanding of AI reasoning.
author: jontomato

title: Foreman: A secure self-hosted agent orchestrator
description: Release of Foreman, a self-hosted tool for orchestrating AI agents with a focus on security and local deployment options for AI-powered workflows.
author: palkeo

title: Generative Linguistics, LLMs, and the Social Nature of Scientific Success
description: Research paper from arXiv examining the intersection of generative linguistics, large language models, and how scientific success becomes socially recognized.
author: 3willows

title: Roblox launches real-time AI chat rephrasing to filter out banned language
description: Roblox implements real-time AI-powered chat rephrasing to automatically filter inappropriate language, showcasing practical AI application in content moderation at scale.
author: SaaSasaurus
